ucs.title: [LLM] ALPHV/BlackCat (Noberus) encryptor launch via mandatory --access-token argument
ucs.description: Hunts execution of the ALPHV/BlackCat Rust-based encryptor binary, which requires a UUID-style --access-token to run and accepts a distinctive clap-style argv (--paths, --child, --no-prop, --no-vm-kill, --propagated, --prop-file). This argv schema is documented by Microsoft, Mandiant, Sophos and Unit42 as a unique Noberus fingerprint and is not shared with other RaaS families.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process="*--access-token*" AND (Processes.process="*--paths*" OR Processes.process="*--child*" OR Processes.process="*--no-prop*" OR Processes.process="*--no-vm-kill*" OR Processes.process="*--propagated*" OR Processes.process="*--prop-file*" OR Processes.process="*--no-wall*" OR Processes.process="*--logs*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_hash Processes.process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | where user!="*$" | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// ALPHV/BlackCat (Noberus) encryptor — Rust binary with distinctive clap argv
let AlphvFlags = dynamic(["--paths","--child","--no-prop","--no-vm-kill","--no-wall","--ui","--prop-file","--propagated","--logs","--drag-and-drop","--drag-and-drop-target"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where ProcessCommandLine has "--access-token"            // mandatory ALPHV runtime token
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (AlphvFlags)            // at least one other ALPHV clap flag
| extend TokenGuid = extract(@"--access-token\s+([0-9a-fA-F\-]{32,36})", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine, TokenGuid,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessAccountObjectId
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// ALPHV/BlackCat (Noberus) encryptor — requires Windows 4688 with CommandLine auditing enabled
let AlphvFlags = dynamic(["--paths","--child","--no-prop","--no-vm-kill","--no-wall","--ui","--prop-file","--propagated","--logs","--drag-and-drop","--drag-and-drop-target"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where CommandLine has "--access-token"
| where CommandLine has_any (AlphvFlags)
| extend TokenGuid = extract(@"--access-token\s+([0-9a-fA-F\-]{32,36})", 1, CommandLine)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, TokenGuid, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: ALPHV BlackCat Noberus Ransomware Execution via Access Token
id: 8f3c9a02-2c0a-4b5c-9c5d-1f3a8a6b9c11
status: experimental
description: Detects ALPHV/BlackCat (Noberus) ransomware encryptor execution. The Rust binary requires a --access-token UUID and accepts a distinctive clap argv (--paths, --child, --no-prop, --propagated) documented by Microsoft, Mandiant and Sophos.
references:
    - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
    - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2022/07/14/blackcat-ransomware-attacks-not-merely-a-byproduct-of-bad-luck/
    - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/unc2596-ransomware-affiliate-blackcat
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
tags:
    - attack.impact
    - attack.t1486
    - attack.g1006
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_token:
        CommandLine|contains: '--access-token'
    selection_flag:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - '--paths'
            - '--child'
            - '--no-prop'
            - '--no-vm-kill'
            - '--no-wall'
            - '--ui'
            - '--prop-file'
            - '--propagated'
            - '--drag-and-drop'
    condition: selection_token and selection_flag
falsepositives:
    - Extremely rare; no benign Rust clap CLI binary in production is known to expose this exact argv combination
level: critical
ucs.rationale: ALPHV/BlackCat is the only documented ransomware family that requires a per-deployment --access-token UUID at runtime (anti-analysis / affiliate gating) AND ships a Rust clap argv with the specific --no-prop / --propagated / --child / --prop-file flag set. Microsoft, Sophos, Mandiant and Unit42 all enumerate this exact argv as a Noberus fingerprint. Detecting the token-plus-flag combination catche

ucs.title: [LLM] ALPHV/BlackCat Safe Mode pre-encryption staging (bcdedit safeboot + VSS wipe + Run-key persistence)
ucs.description: Hunts the BlackCat / Noberus signature pre-encryption ritual: flip the host into Safe Mode with Networking via bcdedit, register the encryptor as a Safe-Boot service or RunOnce, wipe Volume Shadow Copies, then force a reboot. Sophos and Mandiant attribute this exact chain to ALPHV affiliates evading EDRs that don't load in Safe Mode.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as commands from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ( (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND Processes.process="*safeboot*") OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND Processes.process="*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="reg.exe" AND Processes.process="*SafeBoot\\Network*") OR (Processes.process_name="shutdown.exe" AND Processes.process="*/r*") ) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name _time | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | bin _time span=30m | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(process_name) as actions values(commands) as cmdlines by dest user _time | eval bcd=if(match(mvjoin(actions,","),"bcdedit"),1,0), vss=if(match(mvjoin(actions,","),"vssadmin|wmic"),1,0), reg=if(match(mvjoin(actions,","),"reg.exe"),1,0) | where bcd=1 AND (vss=1 OR reg=1) | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// ALPHV/BlackCat Safe-Mode pre-encryption ritual — bcdedit safeboot + VSS wipe + SafeBoot\Network reg key within 30 min
let Window = 30m;
let StagingEvents = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has "safeboot")
         or (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (FileName =~ "reg.exe"      and ProcessCommandLine has @"SafeBoot\Network")
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
         or (FileName =~ "shutdown.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/r","-r"))
    | extend StageType = case(
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe",                                   "SafeBootSet",
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" or FileName =~ "wmic.exe",          "VssWiped",
        FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"),                  "VssWiped",
        FileName =~ "reg.exe",                                       "SafeBootSvcRegistered",
        FileName =~ "shutdown.exe",                                  "ForcedReboot",
        "Other");
StagingEvents
| summarize Stages = make_set(StageType),
            Commands = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 20),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, Window)
| where Stages has "SafeBootSet"
    and array_length(Stages) >= 2                       // bcdedit AND at least one other stage
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// ALPHV/BlackCat Safe-Mode pre-encryption ritual — Sentinel 4688 view
let Window = 30m;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"  and CommandLine has "safeboot")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadows")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\reg.exe"      and CommandLine has @"SafeBoot\Network")
     or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\shutdown.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("/r","-r"))
| extend StageType = case(
    NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe",  "SafeBootSet",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" or NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe"), "VssWiped",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\reg.exe",      "SafeBootSvcRegistered",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\shutdown.exe", "ForcedReboot",
    "Other")
| summarize Stages = make_set(StageType),
            Commands = make_set(CommandLine, 20),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, Window)
| where Stages has "SafeBootSet" and array_length(Stages) >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: BlackCat/ALPHV affiliates (notably UNC4466 and FIN12-aligned operators) have repeatedly been documented by Sophos, Mandiant and CISA AA23-061A using the same bcdedit-safeboot → SafeBoot\Network service registration → VSS wipe → shutdown /r chain to evade EDR (which doesn't load in Safe Mode). Demanding two of these stages within a 30-min window on the same host, by the same user, is highly specifi
